problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
